# Pearl River Design
> Web design agency for contractors and local businesses in Rockland County, NY

## About
Pearl River Design is a one-person web studio run by Jackson O'Hara in Pearl River, NY. We build websites for local contractors and service businesses — fast, professionally designed, and built to rank in Google. Sites go live in 1–2 business days for a flat $1,000 fee with no monthly charges.

## Services
- Contractor websites: $1,000 flat, one time. No monthly fees. No contracts.
- Turnaround: live in 1–2 business days after intake form is submitted
- Includes: custom design, mobile-ready, Google-optimized, contact form
- Service areas: Pearl River, Suffern, Nyack, Nanuet, Spring Valley, Rockland County, NY and surrounding areas

## Who We Serve
We build websites for local service businesses that don't have one yet:
- Plumbers
- Roofers
- Electricians
- HVAC contractors
- Landscapers
- Painters
- Concrete contractors
- Fencing contractors
- Tree service companies
- General contractors

## Pricing
- $1,000 one-time flat fee
- No monthly fees
- No contracts
- Includes hosting setup, domain configuration, contact form, mobile design, and local SEO setup

## How It Works
1. Fill out the intake form at https://pearlriverdesign.dev/onboarding
2. Jackson reviews your info and builds the site (1–2 business days)
3. You review, approve, and go live

## Niche Pages
- Plumber websites: https://pearlriverdesign.dev/plumbing
- Roofer websites: https://pearlriverdesign.dev/roofing
- Electrician websites: https://pearlriverdesign.dev/electrical
- HVAC websites: https://pearlriverdesign.dev/hvac
- Landscaper websites: https://pearlriverdesign.dev/landscaping
- Painter websites: https://pearlriverdesign.dev/painting
- Concrete contractor websites: https://pearlriverdesign.dev/concrete
- Fencing contractor websites: https://pearlriverdesign.dev/fencing
- Tree service websites: https://pearlriverdesign.dev/tree-service

## Common Questions
- How much does a contractor website cost? $1,000 flat, one time. No monthly fees.
- How fast does a site go live? 1–2 business days after the intake form is submitted.
- Do you require a contract? No contracts. No commitments beyond the one-time fee.
- What towns do you serve? Pearl River, Suffern, Nyack, Nanuet, Spring Valley, and all of Rockland County, NY.
- Will my site show up in Google? Every site is built with local SEO from day one.
